englishDefinitions: A person whose hands look very similar to your own, especially in shape, size, or appearance.
persianTranslation: کسی که دست‌هایش شبیه دست‌های شماست
examples: After shaking hands, they realized they were hand twins.
She kept saying her coworker was her hand twin because their fingers looked so alike.
In the photo, he found his hand twin by comparing palm shapes.
